storeListing.title: Trash Tornado
storeListing.shortDescription: Swipe trash into the right bins, dodge toxic barrels, and clean the world.

appAccess.instructions: No sign-in, membership, location gate, or special access is required.

targetAudience.notes: The theme is family-friendly, but this conservative setup avoids the extra Designed for Families review path until a child-safety review is completed.

dataSafety.accountCreation: The app does not allow users to create an account.
dataSafety.notes: Configured in Play Console for Google Mobile Ads-style data disclosures. Local gameplay progress remains on-device.

financialFeatures.notes: The current build does not wire real-money purchases. Change this before enabling in-app purchases.

permissions.notes: The app currently does not request location, camera, contacts, microphone, or storage permissions.
